title: HP Bar Plus
description: HPBarPlus is a customizable client-side mod for displaying health above players\entities.
body:
[![Issues Tracker](https://i.imgur.com/dOS4u9y.png)](https://github.com/LendSpele/HPbarPlus-issues) [![Fabric API](https://i.imgur.com/EbPCzRV.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
# HPBarPlus **A lightweight, fully client-side health display mod.** See HP bars above every entity — with customizable symbols, dynamic gradient colors, and per-entity filtering. ![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f860e224b539019b8b35b01461ebf4f3eacd366f_0.webp) ### 🎯 Symbol-Based HP Display Health is shown using Unicode symbols above entity names. - **2 HP** = full symbol  |  **1 HP** = hollow symbol - *Example:* 19 HP → `❤❤❤❤❤❤❤❤❤♡` ### 🎨 Display Styles Choose how health is displayed: | Style | Example | |---|---| | Icons Only | `❤❤❤❤❤❤❤❤❤❤` | | Icons + Numbers | `❤❤❤❤❤❤❤❤❤❤ 20/20` | | Icon + Numbers | `❤ 20/20` | | Numbers Only | `20/20` | ### 🔤 Symbol Presets Pick your favorite symbol style: > ❤♡  ◆◇  ▼▽  ♦♢  ✦✧  ✮✰  ■□  ●○ ### 🌈 Dynamic Gradient Colors Colors change based on health percentage — from full to critical. **Built-in color presets:** - **Default** — Classic red tones - **Ice** — Snow white → deep blue - **Poison** — Light → dark green - **Vampire** — Blood red → near-black - **Gold** — Bright gold → dark bronze - **Void** — Light purple → deep purple - 🎨 **Custom** — Pick your own 4-stop gradient (100% → 50% → 25% → 0%) Save and load your own custom color presets! ### 🔍 Entity Filtering Control exactly which entities display health bars: - **Category mode** — Toggle Players, Hostile, Passive, Bosses - **Custom Filter mode** — Pick individual entity types from a searchable list - Supports localized search (type in English, Russian, or any language!) - Scrollable popup with per-entity checkboxes - **Show Self** toggle (3rd person only) ### 📐 Adjustable Render Distance Set the HP bar visibility range from **8 to 64 blocks**. ### ⚙️ In-Game Configuration Full settings GUI accessible via **Mod Menu**. Every setting takes effect immediately — no restart needed. ### 💾 Persistent Settings All configuration is stored in `config/HPBarPlus/settings.json`. Legacy config files are automatically migrated. --- ## 🖥️ Client-Side Only This mod is **fully client-side** — no server installation required. Works on any server, singleplayer, and LAN.
